testcase.name: test_stateJson_containsInitialSettlements(Path)
testcase.system-out:
=== START GAME === Max Rounds: 1
=== Initial Placement Phase === Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 3 Player 1: Placed initial road between 9 and 3 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 40 Player 2: Placed initial road between 42 and 40 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 37 Player 3: Placed initial road between 37 and 35 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 0 Player 4: Placed initial road between 0 and 1 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 51 Player 4: Placed initial road between 51 and 52 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 21 Player 3: Placed initial road between 20 and 21 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 15 Player 2: Placed initial road between 15 and 13 Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 46 Player 1: Placed initial road between 45 and 46
1 / 1: Passed 1 / 2: Passed 1 / 3: Passed 1 / 4: Passed

testcase.name: test_stateJson_isUpdatedAfterEachTurn(Path)
testcase.system-out:
=== START GAME === Max Rounds: 10
=== Initial Placement Phase === Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 20 Player 1: Placed initial road between 20 and 21 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 22 Player 2: Placed initial road between 22 and 23 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 5 Player 3: Placed initial road between 13 and 5 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 45 Player 4: Placed initial road between 45 and 46 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 52 Player 4: Placed initial road between 52 and 23 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 38 Player 3: Placed initial road between 38 and 42 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 41 Player 2: Placed initial road between 41 and 43 Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 10 Player 1: Placed initial road between 9 and 10
1 / 1: Passed 1 / 2: Passed 1 / 3: Built road between 39 and 38 1 / 4: Passed 1 / 1: Passed 1 / 2: Passed 1 / 3: Built road between 15 and 13 1 / 4: Passed

testcase.name: test_roundJson_createdWithCorrectContent(Path)
testcase.system-out:
=== START GAME === Max Rounds: 1
=== Initial Placement Phase === Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 19 Player 1: Placed initial road between 17 and 19 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 25 Player 2: Placed initial road between 25 and 26 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 34 Player 3: Placed initial road between 33 and 34 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 52 Player 4: Placed initial road between 52 and 23 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 9 Player 4: Placed initial road between 9 and 3 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 37 Player 3: Placed initial road between 36 and 37 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 42 Player 2: Placed initial road between 42 and 40 Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 41 Player 1: Placed initial road between 41 and 16
1 / 1: Passed ****** A 7 was rolled... Robber activates.... Player 2 moved robber to tile 3 No players to steal from. 1 / 2: Passed 1 / 3: Passed 1 / 4: Passed -----Round 1 ---- Player 1 VP: 0 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 === GAME OVER (Round 2) === No player reached the points needed to win.

testcase.name: test_stateJson_hasCorrectVisualizerStructure(Path)
testcase.system-out:
=== START GAME === Max Rounds: 1
=== Initial Placement Phase === Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 36 Player 1: Placed initial road between 36 and 37 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 16 Player 2: Placed initial road between 18 and 16 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 52 Player 3: Placed initial road between 52 and 53 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 24 Player 4: Placed initial road between 7 and 24 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 8 Player 4: Placed initial road between 7 and 8 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 30 Player 3: Placed initial road between 29 and 30 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 46 Player 2: Placed initial road between 45 and 46 Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 12 Player 1: Placed initial road between 11 and 12
1 / 1: Passed 1 / 2: Passed 1 / 3: Passed 1 / 4: Passed -----Round 1 ---- Player 1 VP: 0 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 === GAME OVER (Round 2) === No player reached the points needed to win.
